description: Designed White House graphic ('November Jobs Report'). The background is a full-bleed photograph of President Donald Trump in a navy blue suit and red tie, standing and clapping on a factory or steel-mill floor; behind him is a crowd of people wearing orange high-visibility jackets and hard hats, with signs partly reading 'AGE' and 'AMERICA', and large rolls of steel and yellow machinery visible. Trump is lit at center against the dark setting. Across the top, a white serif all-caps headline reads 'NOVEMBER JOBS REPORT'. Near the bottom a large bright green rectangle holds a white sans-serif statistic '+121,000', and beneath it white all-caps text reads 'PRIVATE JOB GROWTH SINCE SEPTEMBER / 100% AMONG AMERICANS, NOT ILLEGALS'. At the bottom is the White House line-drawing emblem with the caption 'The WHITE HOUSE'.
notable_text: 'NOVEMBER JOBS REPORT'; '+121,000'; 'PRIVATE JOB GROWTH SINCE SEPTEMBER 100% AMONG AMERICANS, NOT ILLEGALS'; 'The WHITE HOUSE'.
